title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC have updates
scenario: 1-step DFU for language change updates both Earbuds and Charge Case to latest firmware and applies selected language on Osprey device
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure Osprey Earbuds (EB) and Charge Case (CC) are connected, both on firmware version 5039 or later.
3. Verify that firmware updates are available for both the Earbuds and Charge Case.
4. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language.
5. Select a desired language from the list.
6. Tap 'Update Now' to initiate the 1-step DFU for language change.
7. Observe that the Software Update screen is displayed.
8. Wait for the language change DFU process to complete.
9. After completion, verify that both the Earbuds and Charge Case are on the latest firmware version.
10. On the Charge Case touch screen, navigate through the menus to confirm the language has been changed to the selected language.
expected: The Software Update screen is displayed during the DFU. After completion, both the Earbuds and Charge Case are on the latest firmware, and the Charge Case touch screen menus reflect the newly selected language.
